extensions.summary: Published release manifests, indices, component graph hashes, and governance profile hashes are immutable.

stability.rationale: Archive policy IDs are frozen for v0.0.0-mock while operational mirror layouts remain provider-neutral.
stability.replacement_target: Release-series publication bundles and signed mirror manifests.

extensions.summary: Official release archival requires at least primary and secondary mirrors plus recommended cold storage.

stability.rationale: Archive policy IDs are frozen for v0.0.0-mock while operational mirror layouts remain provider-neutral.
stability.replacement_target: Release-series publication bundles and signed mirror manifests.

extensions.summary: Historical release index snapshots are append-only and may not be overwritten once published.
